metadata.name: Counterparty Exposure Limits
metadata.description: Ensures counterparty exposures remain within approved limits

rules.name: Counterparty limit approved
rules.description: Counterparty must have an approved credit limit
rules.remediation: Obtain credit limit approval for the counterparty

rules.name: Exposure within limit
rules.description: Current exposure must not exceed approved limit
rules.remediation: Reduce exposure or request limit increase

rules.name: Warning threshold monitoring
rules.description: Alert when exposure exceeds 80% of limit
rules.remediation: Monitor exposure closely as it approaches limit

rules.name: Limit review current
rules.description: Credit limits must be reviewed at least annually

rules.name: Collateral coverage adequate
rules.description: Collateral must cover exposure for secured counterparties
